authority_note: All narrative content derives from 41.x projection fields only. No interpretation beyond condition co-presence and attribution profile records. No causal claims. No recommendations. No focus domain selected. No zone ranking applied. PSIG signals are PROVISIONAL_CKR_CANDIDATE.

structural_blind_spot.note: PSIG-006 (structural blind-spot signal) is activated but not assigned to any pressure zone. Its condition scope covers DOM-01, DOM-02, and NODE-001 through NODE-007 — structural entities not included in PZ-001, PZ-002, or PZ-003. PSIG-006 activation does not modify the COMPOUND_ZONE classification of any zone in this package.

zone_narratives.executive_summary: Three structural conditions are simultaneously co-present in the backend_isolated domain scope: fan-in concentration (PSIG-001, value 9.43), fan-out propagation (PSIG-002, value 9.43), and responsibility concentration (PSIG-004, value 4.33). All three are activated at HIGH state via run-relative outlier method. backend_isolated carries secondary attribution for PSIG-001 and PSIG-004 — the primary attribution entity (NODE-009) resides in the frontend_isolated domain (DOM-04). For PSIG-002, no single primary attribution entity exists; attribution distributes across DOM-03, DOM-04, and DOM-05. Co-presence of three simultaneously activated conditions from distinct pressure families (coupling, propagation, responsibility) produces the COMPOUND_ZONE designation. No focus domain has been selected; this zone is not ranked relative to PZ-002 or PZ-003.

conditions.statistical_note: IQR degenerate; mean+2SD fallback boundary=6.228 applied

zone_narratives.pressure_meaning: COMPOUND_ZONE (Class 6 per PI.THRESHOLD-FOUNDATION.FORENSICS.75X.01) designates a structural location where conditions from two or more distinct pressure families are simultaneously activated. For PZ-001 (backend_isolated), three pressure families are co-present: coupling (PSIG-001 — fan-in concentration), propagation (PSIG-002 — fan-out propagation), and responsibility (PSIG-004 — responsibility concentration). The embedded pair rules — COUPLING_ZONE, PROPAGATION_ZONE, RESPONSIBILITY_ZONE — record the pairwise structural rule combinations active within this compound designation. Secondary attribution means that NODE-008, the member entity of backend_isolated, is included in the condition scope for PSIG-001 and PSIG-004, while the maximum-attribution entity (NODE-009) is located in the frontend_isolated domain. This is a factual record of condition co-presence and attribution — not a causal or severity claim.

unresolved_boundaries.reason: No focus-domain selection rule has been authorized for this run. PZ-001 is not ranked against PZ-002 or PZ-003. Source: projection_manifest.json: focus_domain_selected=false, ranking_applied=false.

Activation values and RUN_RELATIVE_OUTLIER method are specific to run_01_oss_fastapi static structural analysis.
All conditions derive from a single run (run_01_oss_fastapi). RUN_RELATIVE_OUTLIER method normalizes within this run only. No cross-run comparison is available.
